title: SAGIDE Skill Definition
description: Schema for skill YAML files under skills/{domain}/{name}.yaml

name.description: Skill identifier — must match the filename without .yaml extension.

version.description: Increment on breaking changes to outputs_schema (the stable interface contract).

domain.description: Must match the parent directory name (e.g. research, finance, shared).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this skill does.

protocol_implements.description: Protocol names this skill satisfies (e.g. Collectible, Analyzable, Reportable).

inputs.description: Typed parameter declarations callers must supply.

type.description: Parameter type: string | array | object | integer | boolean

outputs_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the skill's output. This is the stable interface contract — changing outputs_schema is a breaking change (bump version). Changing only the implementation prompt is not.

capability_requirements.description: Named capability slots resolved by routing config. Skills declare what they need; appsettings.json maps capabilities to actual model@machine specs.

needs.description: Required model capabilities. Must use approved vocabulary slots.

parameters.description: Default values for implementation template variables. Callers override via the parameters: block in data_collection steps.

implementation.description: Ordered list of data_collection step primitives that implement this skill. Same step types as in prompt data_collection.
